domain: x > 0, y real (x = y = 0 is a curvature singularity; x = 0 is an axis)

suggested_orbit_data.note: bound region is x^2 + y^2(1-E^2) + L^2/x^2 < E^2 - L^2; requires E < 1. The L^2/x^2 barrier keeps orbits off the singularity.
